cases.title: BRD §1.7 participant sees organizer-uploaded cover on event list and detail
preconditions: Published discoverable event with cover_image_key set via prior OrganizerAdmin upload
Participant JWT or public list/detail access per GET /events policy
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 as participant and locate the covered event in items
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} as participant and read coverImageUrl
GET coverImageUrl (or GET /api/v1/media/events/{key}) to fetch image bytes
cases.expected: Paginated list item includes non-null coverImageUrl when cover_image_key is set; event detail includes same coverImageUrl; media GET returns HTTP 200 with correct Content-Type and bytes matching upload — satisfies BRD AC-17 and FR-36 participant visibility on discovery and detail surfaces

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events list includes coverImageUrl; GET /media/events/{key} returns HTTP 200
preconditions: Published event with cover_image_key set via organizer upload
Participant JWT or public list access per API policy
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 as participant
Locate event with cover in items array and read coverImageUrl
GET the coverImageUrl (or GET /api/v1/media/events/{key})
cases.expected: GET /events returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope; list item includes coverImageUrl when cover_image_key is set; media GET returns HTTP 200 with correct Content-Type (image/jpeg, image/png, or image/webp) and bytes matching upload per API design §2.7

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} detail includes coverImageUrl for participant
preconditions: Event with uploaded cover image and known cover_image_key
Participant authenticated or public detail access per API policy
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and read coverImageUrl from response
GET coverImageUrl (or derived GET /api/v1/media/events/{key})
cases.expected: GET /events/{eventId} returns HTTP 200; response includes coverImageUrl; media GET returns HTTP 200 with correct Content-Type and bytes matching upload; FR-36 participant event detail cover display satisfied

cases.title: Organizer Admin event list and detail include coverImageUrl when cover exists
preconditions: Published event in organizer scope with cover_image_key set
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with OrganizerAdmin bearer token
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 scoped to organizer-visible events
cases.expected: Organizer detail and list responses return HTTP 200 and include coverImageUrl for events with cover; organizer reads the same cover metadata participants see per FR-36 organizers see cover on discovery and detail surfaces

cases.title: Event repository maps cover_image_key to coverImageUrl on list and detail reads
preconditions: Event row in Postgres with cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at set
Media file persisted under UPLOADS_DIR for that key
Integration test harness with transaction rollback per test
steps: Query events table for seeded cover_image_key
Invoke event list/detail read path via service or repository against real DB
GET returned coverImageUrl via media route
cases.expected: Read path derives non-null coverImageUrl from cover_image_key on both list and detail DTOs; media GET returns HTTP 200 from controlled storage path; no raw filesystem URL exposed per NFR-18

cases.title: Displayed cover media returns correct Content-Type for JPEG, PNG, and WebP uploads
preconditions: Three events each with cover uploaded as JPEG, PNG, and WebP respectively in Postgres
coverImageUrl available on each event detail
steps: GET coverImageUrl for JPEG-covered event and inspect Content-Type header
Repeat for PNG and WebP covered events
cases.expected: Each media response Content-Type matches uploaded format (image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp); browsers and next/image can render covers correctly per NFR-18 validation contract

cases.title: Participant event discovery card renders 16:9 cover thumbnail via next/image
preconditions: Web app running with participant event discovery page
Published event with uploaded cover visible in browse list
Participant session or public browse enabled
steps: Navigate to participant event discovery (paginated card grid)
Locate event card for seeded event with cover
Inspect cover image region dimensions and rendered image source
cases.expected: Event card displays cover thumbnail in 16:9 aspect ratio using next/image; uploaded cover visible on discovery card per event-specific components spec and page-list discovery card grid

cases.title: Participant event detail header renders cover image hero
preconditions: Published event with uploaded cover image
Participant navigated to event detail page for that event
steps: Open event detail from discovery card
Observe event detail header cover hero region
cases.expected: Event detail header renders cover image hero above event metadata; image matches uploaded cover; satisfies FR-36 event detail display and event-specific components Event detail header fields

cases.title: Organizer views cover on event detail when reviewing managed event
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in
Managed event with uploaded cover image
Organizer navigates to event detail or preview for that event
steps: As OrganizerAdmin, open event detail or operational view that surfaces participant-facing header
Confirm cover hero or thumbnail is visible
cases.expected: Organizer sees the same cover image on event detail as participants; FR-36 organizer visibility on event detail satisfied

cases.title: Event list and detail omit coverImageUrl when cover_image_key is null
preconditions: Published discoverable event without cover_image_key
Participant or public read access
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and locate event without cover
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} for same event
cases.expected: List item and detail response omit coverImageUrl or return null; no media URL fabricated; API contract per 05-api-design includes coverImageUrl only when cover_image_key is set

cases.title: GET /media/events/{invalid-key} returns HTTP 404 for unknown storage key
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Non-existent or orphaned media key not bound to any event
steps: GET /api/v1/media/events/{random-uuid-or-unknown-key}
cases.expected: HTTP 404 entity not found; typed error envelope with requestId; no filesystem path leakage in response per API error contract

cases.title: Discovery card shows fallback illustration when event has no cover
preconditions: Published event without cover_image_key visible in discovery list
Participant on event discovery page
steps: Navigate to participant event discovery
Locate card for event without cover
Inspect cover thumbnail slot
cases.expected: Card renders neutral fallback illustration in 16:9 slot; no broken image icon; matches page-list fallback when no cover and event-specific components placeholder spec

cases.title: Event detail hero shows placeholder when navigating to event without cover
preconditions: Published event without cover_image_key
Participant on event detail page for that event
steps: Navigate directly to event detail URL for no-cover event
Inspect cover hero region in event detail header
cases.expected: Detail header renders without broken image; neutral placeholder or omitted hero per component spec; FR-36 graceful no-cover detail display

cases.title: After organizer deletes cover, list and detail no longer expose coverImageUrl
preconditions: Event previously had cover_image_key
OrganizerAdmin performs DELETE /events/{eventId}/cover-image
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as OrganizerAdmin
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 as participant and inspect list item
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} as participant
cases.expected: Post-delete list and detail omit coverImageUrl; prior media URL no longer associated with event; display surfaces fall back to no-cover state per FR-36

cases.title: After cover replace, participant list and detail reflect updated coverImageUrl
preconditions: Event with existing cover_image_key in Postgres
OrganizerAdmin uploads replacement image via POST /events/{eventId}/cover-image
Participant read access
steps: Record original coverImageUrl from GET /events/{eventId}
POST replacement cover image via media module
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}
Fetch new coverImageUrl bytes
cases.expected: coverImageUrl changes on both list and detail; new URL serves replacement bytes; stale cover no longer displayed; FR-36 display stays in sync with FR-35 replace

cases.title: coverImageUrl consistent between list item and detail for same event
preconditions: Event with cover on page 1 of participant browse list
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and read coverImageUrl from matching list item
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and read coverImageUrl from detail
cases.expected: List item coverImageUrl equals detail coverImageUrl for the same eventId; no divergent media references between discovery card and detail hero data sources

cases.title: Paginated page 2 list items include coverImageUrl when cover_image_key is set
preconditions: At least 13 discoverable events with at least one covered event appearing on page 2
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=2&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
Locate covered event on page 2 if present
cases.expected: Page-2 items with cover_image_key include coverImageUrl same as page 1 contract; pagination does not strip cover metadata per AC-13 correct slice semantics
